Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************

 Preservation of (co)limits

 Content
 1. Preservation of terminal objects
 2. Preservation of binary products
 3. Preservation of products
 4. Preservation of equalizers
 5. Preservation of pullbacks
 6. Preservation of initial objects
 7. Preservation of binary coproducts
 8. Preservation of (reflexive) coequalizers
 9. Preservation of coproducts
 10. Preservation of pushouts
 11. Adjunctions and preservation
 11.1 Right adjoints preserve limits
 11.2 Left adjoints preserve colimits

 *********************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Opp.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. Preservation of terminal objects
 *)
Section PreservesTerminal.

  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}.
  Context (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂).

  Definition preserves_terminal
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : C₁), isTerminal C₁ x → isTerminal C₂ (F x).

  Context (H : preserves_terminal)
          (T : Terminal C₁)
          (T' : Terminal C₂).

  Definition preserves_terminal_to_terminal
    : Terminal C₂
    := make_Terminal _ (H _ (pr2 T)).

  Definition preserves_terminal_to_z_iso
    : z_iso preserves_terminal_to_terminal T'
    := z_iso_Terminals _ _.

End PreservesTerminal.


C₁, C₂: category
T: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
x: C₁
# F (TerminalArrow T x) =
TerminalArrow (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F HF T)
  (F x)


C₁, C₂: category
T: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
x: C₁
# F (TerminalArrow T x) =
TerminalArrow (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F HF T)
  (F x)

  apply (TerminalArrowEq (T := preserves_terminal_to_terminal F HF T)).
Qed.

Definition identity_preserves_terminal
           (C : category)
  : preserves_terminal (functor_identity C)
  := λ x Hx, Hx.

Definition composition_preserves_terminal
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {G : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
           (HF : preserves_terminal F)
           (HG : preserves_terminal G)
  : preserves_terminal (F ∙ G)
  := λ x Hx, HG _ (HF _ Hx).


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_terminal F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_terminal F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t: C₁
t0: isTerminal C₁ t
t1: C₂
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t0 : C₂, iscontr (C₂ ⟦ t0, F t ⟧)) t1)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition preserves_chosen_terminal
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (HC₁ : Terminal C₁)
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := isTerminal C₂ (F (TerminalObject HC₁)).


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_terminal HC₁ F
preserves_terminal F


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_terminal HC₁ F
preserves_terminal F

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_terminal HC₁ F
x: C₁
Hx: isTerminal C₁ x
isTerminal C₂ (F x)

  exact (iso_to_Terminal
           (make_Terminal _ HF)
           _
           (functor_on_z_iso
              F
              (z_iso_Terminals HC₁ (make_Terminal _ Hx)))).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F_T: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ F
∏ T₂ : Terminal C₂, z_iso T₂ (F T₁)


C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F_T: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ F
∏ T₂ : Terminal C₂, z_iso T₂ (F T₁)

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F_T: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ F
T₂: Terminal C₂
z_iso T₂ (F T₁)

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F_T: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ F
T₂: Terminal C₂
preserves_terminal F

  exact (preserves_terminal_if_preserves_chosen _ _ F_T).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: is_z_isomorphism (TerminalArrow T₂ (F T₁))
preserves_terminal F

T₁: Terminal C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

 exact T₂.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: is_z_isomorphism (TerminalArrow T₂ (F T₁))

 exact (z_iso_inv (_ ,, HF)).

C: category
T: Terminal C
preserves_chosen_terminal T (functor_identity C)


C: category
T: Terminal C
preserves_chosen_terminal T (functor_identity C)

  apply T.
Qed.


C₀, C₁, C₂: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
T₀: Terminal C₀
T₁: Terminal C₁
F_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ F
G_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ G
preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ (F ∙ G)


C₀, C₁, C₂: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
T₀: Terminal C₀
T₁: Terminal C₁
F_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ F
G_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ G
preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ (F ∙ G)

  
C₀, C₁, C₂: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
T₀: Terminal C₀
T₁: Terminal C₁
F_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ F
G_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ G
t₁:= preserves_terminal_if_preserves_chosen T₀ F F_pT: preserves_terminal F
preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ (F ∙ G)

  
C₀, C₁, C₂: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
T₀: Terminal C₀
T₁: Terminal C₁
F_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ F
G_pT: preserves_chosen_terminal T₁ G
t₁:= preserves_terminal_if_preserves_chosen T₀ F F_pT: preserves_terminal F
t₂:= preserves_terminal_if_preserves_chosen T₁ G G_pT: preserves_terminal G
preserves_chosen_terminal T₀ (F ∙ G)

  apply (t₂ _ (t₁ _ (pr2 T₀))).
Qed.

Definition preserves_chosen_terminal_eq
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (T₁ : Terminal C₁)
           (T₂ : Terminal C₂)
  : UU
  := ∥ F T₁ = T₂ ∥.


C: category
T: Terminal C
preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (functor_identity C) T T


C: category
T: Terminal C
preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (functor_identity C) T T

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
functor_identity C T = T

  apply idpath.
Qed.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

T₂: Terminal C₂
T₃: Terminal C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_terminal_eq F T₁ T₂
HG: preserves_chosen_terminal_eq G T₂ T₃
preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

T₃: Terminal C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_terminal_eq F T₁ T₂
HG: preserves_chosen_terminal_eq G T₂ T₃
preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Terminal C₁

T₃: Terminal C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_terminal_eq G T₂ T₃
preserves_chosen_terminal_eq F T₁ T₂
→ preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

T₁: Terminal C₁

T₃: Terminal C₃

isaprop (preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃)

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

T₃: Terminal C₃

F T₁ = T₂ → preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

T₃: Terminal C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_terminal_eq G T₂ T₃
isaprop (preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃)

    apply propproperty.

p: F T₁ = T₂

→ preserves_chosen_terminal_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

p: F T₁ = T₂
q: G T₂ = T₃
ishinh_UU (G (F T₁) = T₃)

p: F T₁ = T₂
q: G T₂ = T₃
T₃ = T₃

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(**
 2. Preservation of binary products
 *)
Section PreservesBinProduct.

  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}.
  Context (HC₁ : BinProducts C₁).
  Context (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂).

  Definition preserves_binproduct
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y prod : C₁)
        (π₁ : prod --> x)
        (π₂ : prod --> y),
      isBinProduct C₁ x y prod π₁ π₂
      →
      isBinProduct C₂ (F x) (F y) (F prod) (#F π₁) (#F π₂).

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop preserves_binproduct

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop preserves_binproduct

    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2: C₁ ⟦ t1, t ⟧
t3: C₁ ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: isBinProduct C₁ t t0 t1 t2 t3
t5: C₂
t6: C₂ ⟦ t5, F t ⟧
t7: C₂ ⟦ t5, F t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t4 : C₂ ⟦ t5, F t0 ⟧,
    ∃! fg : C₂ ⟦ t5, F t1 ⟧,
    fg · # F t2 = t6 × fg · # F t3 = t4) t7)

    use isapropiscontr.
  Qed.

  Definition preserves_chosen_binproduct
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C₁),
      isBinProduct
        C₂
        (F x) (F y)
        (F (BinProductObject C₁ (HC₁ x y)))
        (#F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ x y)))
        (#F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ x y))).

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_binproduct
preserves_binproduct

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_binproduct
preserves_binproduct

    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_binproduct
x, y, z: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hxy: isBinProduct C₁ x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₂ (F x) (F y) (F z) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)

    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_binproduct
x, y, z: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hxy: isBinProduct C₁ x y z π₁ π₂
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ (HC₁ x y) π₁ π₂)
· # F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ x y)) = # F π₁
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_binproduct
x, y, z: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hxy: isBinProduct C₁ x y z π₁ π₂
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ (HC₁ x y) π₁ π₂)
· # F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ x y)) = # F π₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_binproduct
x, y, z: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hxy: isBinProduct C₁ x y z π₁ π₂
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ (HC₁ x y) π₁ π₂)
· # F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (HC₁ x y)) = # F π₁
 abstract
        (rewrite <- functor_comp ;
        rewrite BinProductPr1Commutes ;
        apply idpath).
    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_binproduct
x, y, z: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ z, y ⟧
Hxy: isBinProduct C₁ x y z π₁ π₂
# F (BinProductArrow C₁ (HC₁ x y) π₁ π₂)
· # F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (HC₁ x y)) = # F π₂
 abstract
        (rewrite <- functor_comp ;
        rewrite BinProductPr2Commutes ;
        apply idpath).
  Defined.

  Section Accessors.

    Context {X X' : C₁}
            (H : preserves_binproduct)
            (BP : BinProduct _ X X')
            (BP' : BinProduct _ (F X) (F X')).

    Definition preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct
      : BinProduct _ (F X) (F X')
      := make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ (H _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 BP)).

    Definition preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
      : z_iso preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct BP'
      := iso_between_BinProduct _ _.

    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
H: preserves_binproduct
BP: BinProduct C₁ X X'
BP': BinProduct C₂ (F X) (F X')
# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ BP) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso · BinProductPr1 C₂ BP'

    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
H: preserves_binproduct
BP: BinProduct C₁ X X'
BP': BinProduct C₂ (F X) (F X')
# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ BP) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso · BinProductPr1 C₂ BP'

      exact (!BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
H: preserves_binproduct
BP: BinProduct C₁ X X'
BP': BinProduct C₂ (F X) (F X')
# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ BP) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso · BinProductPr2 C₂ BP'

BP': BinProduct C₂ (F X) (F X')
# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ BP) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso · BinProductPr2 C₂ BP'

      exact (!BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
    Qed.

# F (BinProductArrow C₁ BP f f') =
BinProductArrow C₂ BP' (# F f) (# F f')
· inv_from_z_iso preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso

BP': BinProduct C₂ (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ Y, X ⟧

C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinProducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
H: preserves_binproduct
BP: BinProduct C₁ X X'
BP': BinProduct C₂ (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ Y, X ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ Y, X' ⟧
BinProductArrow C₂ BP' (# F f) (# F f')
· BinProductPr2 C₂ BP' = # F f'

        exact (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
    Qed.

  End Accessors.

End PreservesBinProduct.


C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
preserves_binproduct F


C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
preserves_binproduct F

  
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
preserves_chosen_binproduct P₁ F

  
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
x, y: C₁
isBinProduct C₂ (F x) (F y) (F (P₁ x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
x, y: C₁
z_iso (F (P₁ x y)) (P₂ (F x) (F y))
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
x, y: C₁
# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)) =
?f · BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
x, y: C₁
# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y)) =
?f · BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))

  
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
x, y: C₁
z_iso (F (P₁ x y)) (P₂ (F x) (F y))
 exact (_ ,, HF x y).
  
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
x, y: C₁
# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)) =
(BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
   (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
   (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))),, HF x y)
· BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite BinProductPr1Commutes ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: category
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: ∏ x y : C₁,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))))
x, y: C₁
# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y)) =
(BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
   (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x y)))
   (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x y))),, HF x y)
· BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (F x) (F y))
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite BinProductPr2Commutes ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁)
     (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
       (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))


C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁)
     (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
       (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g)
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g)
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F

    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =

  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

BC₂: BinProducts C₂

H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g)
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?b

  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂

    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
       (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f)
       (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
       (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f)
       (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g)) = ?y'

      
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
# F
  (BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g)) = ?t2

      apply (preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_arrow F HF (BC₁ _ _) (BC₂ _ _)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· (BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
          (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· (BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
   · BinProductArrow C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
          (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
       (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))))
· # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

        (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
      · # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

   · # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))

   · (BinProductArrow C₂

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)

  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?t2

      apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ H₂).
    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· (BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))

C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁)) = ?y'

      apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ H₁).
    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F f =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr121 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)

H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF

BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F f

    apply idpath.
  
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g)
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂) (BC₁ x₁ y₁) f g)
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?b

· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
       (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f)
       (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g)) = ?y'

      
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
# F
  (BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g)) = ?t2

      apply (preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_arrow F HF (BC₁ _ _) (BC₂ _ _)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· (BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF (BC₁ x₂ y₂)
          (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· (BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
   · BinProductArrow C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
          (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
       (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))))
· # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
       (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂))

  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)

  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))

   · (BinProductArrow C₂
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
           (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
        (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
      · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

   · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· (BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
   · (BinProductArrow C₂
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
           (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
        (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
      · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?t2

      apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ H₂).

  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)))
· (BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
     (# F (BinProductPr1 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · f))
     (# F (BinProductPr2 C₁ (BC₁ x₁ y₁) · g))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))) =

  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)

     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))

   · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))

C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F g =
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)))
