g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂))) =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F g

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
?b = BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F g

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
        (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
   · # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂))) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF (BC₁ x₂ y₂))
  (BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)))
· # F (pr221 (BC₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?t2

      apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ H₂).
    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂))
  (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) (# F f) (# F g)
· BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)) =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F g

    
C₁, C₂: category
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
H₁:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₁ y₁): BinProduct C₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)
H₂:= preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF
  (BC₁ x₂ y₂): BinProduct C₂ (F x₂) (F y₂)
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F g =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x₁) (F y₁)) · # F g

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition identity_preserves_binproduct
          (C : category)
  : preserves_binproduct (functor_identity C)
  := λ _ _ _ _ _ Hx, Hx.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_binproduct (F ∙ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_binproduct (F ∙ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, prod: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ prod, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ prod, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₁ x y prod π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ((F ∙ G) prod)
  (# (F ∙ G) π₁) (# (F ∙ G) π₂)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, prod: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ prod, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ prod, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₁ x y prod π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₂ (F x) (F y) (F prod) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_binproduct F
HG: preserves_binproduct G
x, y, prod: C₁
π₁: C₁ ⟦ prod, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ prod, y ⟧
Hx: isBinProduct C₁ x y prod π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C₁ x y prod π₁ π₂

  exact Hx.
Defined.

(**
 3. Preservation of products
 *)
Section PreservesProduct.

  Context (J : UU).
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}.
  Context (HC₁ : Products J C₁).
  Context (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂).

  Definition preserves_product
    : UU
    := ∏ (D : J → C₁)
        (c : C₁)
        (ι : ∏ (j : J), c --> D j),
      isProduct J C₁ D c ι
      →
      isProduct J C₂ (λ j, F (D j)) (F c) (λ j, #F (ι j)).

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop preserves_product

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop preserves_product

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t: J → C₁
t0: C₁
t1: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ t0, t j ⟧
t2: isProduct J C₁ t t0 t1
t3: C₂
t4: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ t3, (λ j : J, F (t j)) i ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t2 : ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ t3, (λ j : J, F (t j)) i ⟧,
    ∃! fap : C₂ ⟦ t3, F t0 ⟧,
    ∏ i : J, fap · (λ j : J, # F (t1 j)) i = t2 i) t4)

    use isapropiscontr.
  Qed.

  Definition preserves_chosen_product
    : UU
    := ∏ (D : J → C₁),
      isProduct
        J
        C₂
        (λ j, F(D j))
        (F (HC₁ D))
        (λ j, #F (ProductPr _ _ (HC₁ D) j)).

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
preserves_product

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
preserves_product

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
x: J → C₁
z: C₁
π: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ z, x j ⟧
Hxy: isProduct J C₁ x z π
isProduct J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F z)
  (λ j : J, # F (π j))

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
x: J → C₁
z: C₁
π: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ z, x j ⟧
Hxy: isProduct J C₁ x z π
p:= make_Product J C₁ x z π Hxy: Product J C₁ x
isProduct J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F z)
  (λ j : J, # F (π j))

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
x: J → C₁
z: C₁
π: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ z, x j ⟧
Hxy: isProduct J C₁ x z π
p:= make_Product J C₁ x z π Hxy: Product J C₁ x
i:= z_iso_between_Product p (HC₁ x): z_iso p (HC₁ x)
isProduct J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F z)
  (λ j : J, # F (π j))

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
x: J → C₁
z: C₁
π: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ z, x j ⟧
Hxy: isProduct J C₁ x z π
p:= make_Product J C₁ x z π Hxy: Product J C₁ x
i:= z_iso_between_Product p (HC₁ x): z_iso p (HC₁ x)
i':= functor_on_z_iso F i: z_iso (F p) (F (HC₁ x))
isProduct J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F z)
  (λ j : J, # F (π j))

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
x: J → C₁
z: C₁
π: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ z, x j ⟧
Hxy: isProduct J C₁ x z π
p:= make_Product J C₁ x z π Hxy: Product J C₁ x
i:= z_iso_between_Product p (HC₁ x): z_iso p (HC₁ x)
i':= functor_on_z_iso F i: z_iso (F p) (F (HC₁ x))
p':= make_Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F (HC₁ x))
  (λ j : J, # F (ProductPr J C₁ (HC₁ x) j)) (HF x): Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j))
isProduct J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F z)
  (λ j : J, # F (π j))

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
x: J → C₁
z: C₁
π: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ z, x j ⟧
Hxy: isProduct J C₁ x z π
p:= make_Product J C₁ x z π Hxy: Product J C₁ x
i:= z_iso_between_Product p (HC₁ x): z_iso p (HC₁ x)
i':= functor_on_z_iso F i: z_iso (F p) (F (HC₁ x))
p':= make_Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F (HC₁ x))
  (λ j : J, # F (ProductPr J C₁ (HC₁ x) j)) (HF x): Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j))
∏ j : J,
(λ j0 : J, i' · ProductPr J C₂ p' j0) j =
(λ j0 : J, # F (π j0)) j

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_product
x: J → C₁
z: C₁
π: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ z, x j ⟧
Hxy: isProduct J C₁ x z π
p:= make_Product J C₁ x z π Hxy: Product J C₁ x
i:= z_iso_between_Product p (HC₁ x): z_iso p (HC₁ x)
i':= functor_on_z_iso F i: z_iso (F p) (F (HC₁ x))
p':= make_Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j)) (F (HC₁ x))
  (λ j : J, # F (ProductPr J C₁ (HC₁ x) j)) (HF x): Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (x j))
j: J
(λ j : J, i' · ProductPr J C₂ p' j) j =
(λ j : J, # F (π j)) j

    abstract exact (!functor_comp _ _ _ @ maponpaths _ (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _)).
  Defined.

  Section Accessors.

    Context {X : J → C₁}.
    Context (H : preserves_product).
    Context (P : Product _ _ X).
    Context (P' : Product J C₂ (λ j, F (X j))).

    Definition preserves_product_to_product
      : Product _ _ (λ j, F (X j))
      := make_Product _ _ _ _ _ (H _ _ _ (pr2 P)).

    Definition preserves_product_to_z_iso
      : z_iso preserves_product_to_product P'
      := z_iso_between_Product _ _.

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X: J → C₁
H: preserves_product
P: Product J C₁ X
P': Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (X j))
j: J
inv_from_z_iso preserves_product_to_z_iso
· # F (ProductPr J C₁ P j) = ProductPr J C₂ P' j

    
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X: J → C₁
H: preserves_product
P: Product J C₁ X
P': Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (X j))
j: J
inv_from_z_iso preserves_product_to_z_iso
· # F (ProductPr J C₁ P j) = ProductPr J C₂ P' j

      
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Products J C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X: J → C₁
H: preserves_product
P: Product J C₁ X
P': Product J C₂ (λ j : J, F (X j))
j: J
# F (ProductPr J C₁ P j) =
preserves_product_to_z_iso · ProductPr J C₂ P' j

      exact (!ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ P' _ _ _).
    Qed.

  End Accessors.

End PreservesProduct.

Definition identity_preserves_product
           (C : category)
           (J : UU)
  : preserves_product J (functor_identity C)
  := λ _ _ _ Hx, Hx.


J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_product J F
HG: preserves_product J G
preserves_product J (F ∙ G)


J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_product J F
HG: preserves_product J G
preserves_product J (F ∙ G)

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_product J F
HG: preserves_product J G
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ c, D j ⟧
Hx: isProduct J C₁ D c ι
isProduct J C₃ (λ j : J, (F ∙ G) (D j)) ((F ∙ G) c)
  (λ j : J, # (F ∙ G) (ι j))

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_product J F
HG: preserves_product J G
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ c, D j ⟧
Hx: isProduct J C₁ D c ι
isProduct J C₂ (λ j : J, F (D j)) (F c)
  (λ j : J, # F (ι j))

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_product J F
HG: preserves_product J G
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ c, D j ⟧
Hx: isProduct J C₁ D c ι
isProduct J C₁ D c ι

  exact Hx.
Defined.

Definition preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (BP₁ : BinProducts C₁)
           (BP₂ : BinProducts C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ x y : C₁,  ∥ F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y) ∥.


C: category
BP: BinProducts C
preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq (functor_identity C)
  BP BP


C: category
BP: BinProducts C
preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq (functor_identity C)
  BP BP

  
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
x, y: C
∥ functor_identity C (BP x y) =
  BP (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y) ∥

  
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
x, y: C
functor_identity C (BP x y) =
BP (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq (F ∙ G) BP₁ BP₃


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq (F ∙ G) BP₁ BP₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥)
 apply propproperty. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
G (BP₂ (F x) (F y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥)
 apply propproperty. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
G (BP₂ (F x) (F y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
HGxy: G (BP₂ (F x) (F y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))
∥ (F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
HGxy: G (BP₂ (F x) (F y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))
(F ∙ G) (BP₁ x y) = BP₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
HGxy: G (BP₂ (F x) (F y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))
G (F (BP₁ x y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BP₁: BinProducts C₁
BP₂: BinProducts C₂
BP₃: BinProducts C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq F BP₁ BP₂
HG: preserves_chosen_binproducts_eq G BP₂ BP₃
x, y: C₁
HFxy: F (BP₁ x y) = BP₂ (F x) (F y)
HGxy: G (BP₂ (F x) (F y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))
G (BP₂ (F x) (F y)) = BP₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y))

  now rewrite HGxy.
Qed.

(**
 4. Preservation of equalizers
 *)
Definition preserves_equalizer
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y e : C₁)
       (f g : x --> y)
       (h : e --> x)
       (p : h · f = h · g)
       (Fp : #F h · #F f = #F h · #F g),
     isEqualizer f g h p
     →
     isEqualizer (#F f) (#F g) (#F h) Fp.

Definition identity_preserves_equalizer
           (C : category)
  : preserves_equalizer (functor_identity C)
  := λ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ Hx, Hx.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
preserves_equalizer (F ∙ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
preserves_equalizer (F ∙ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
isEqualizer (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) (# (F ∙ G) h)
  Fp

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
# F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
isEqualizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ?p

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
# F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       rewrite p ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
isEqualizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h)
  (composition_preserves_equalizer_subproof C₁ C₂ F x
     y e f g h p)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
h · f = h · g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
isEqualizer f g h ?p

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
h · f = h · g
 exact p.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_equalizer F
HG: preserves_equalizer G
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) h · # (F ∙ G) g
Hx: isEqualizer f g h p
isEqualizer f g h p
 exact Hx.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_equalizer F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_equalizer F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2, t3: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C₁ ⟦ t1, t ⟧
t5: t4 · t2 = t4 · t3
t6: # F t4 · # F t2 = # F t4 · # F t3
t7: isEqualizer t2 t3 t4 t5
t8: C₂
t9: C₂ ⟦ t8, F t ⟧
t10: t9 · # F t2 = t9 · # F t3
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : t9 · # F t2 = t9 · # F t3,
    ∃! φ : C₂ ⟦ t8, F t1 ⟧, φ · # F t4 = t9) t10)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition preserves_chosen_equalizer
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (HC₁ : Equalizers C₁)
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C₁)
       (f g : x --> y)
       (p : # F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) · # F f
            =
            # F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) · # F g),
     isEqualizer
       (#F f)
       (#F g)
       (#F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)))
       p.


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Equalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizer HC₁ F
preserves_equalizer F


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Equalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizer HC₁ F
preserves_equalizer F

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Equalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizer HC₁ F
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
isEqualizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) Fp

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Equalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizer HC₁ F
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
# F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) · # F g
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Equalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizer HC₁ F
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
# F h =
functor_on_z_iso F
  (z_iso_from_Equalizer_to_Equalizer
     (make_Equalizer f g h p H) (HC₁ x y f g))
· # F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Equalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizer HC₁ F
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
# F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) · # F g
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply EqualizerEqAr).
  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Equalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizer HC₁ F
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
# F h =
functor_on_z_iso F
  (z_iso_from_Equalizer_to_Equalizer
     (make_Equalizer f g h p H) (HC₁ x y f g))
· # F (EqualizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite <- functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       refine (!_) ;
       unfold from_Equalizer_to_Equalizer ;
       apply EqualizerCommutes).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: Equalizer f g
Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: Equalizer f g
Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: Equalizer f g
# F (EqualizerArrow e) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow e) · # F g

  abstract
    (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
     apply maponpaths ;
     apply EqualizerEqAr).
Defined.

Definition preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (BE₁ : Equalizers C₁)
           (BE₂ : Equalizers C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C₁) (f g : C₁⟦x,y⟧), ∥ F (BE₁ _ _ f g) = BE₂ _ _ (#F f) (#F g) ∥.


C: category
BE: Equalizers C
preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq (functor_identity C) BE
  BE


C: category
BE: Equalizers C
preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq (functor_identity C) BE
  BE

  
C: category
BE: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∥ functor_identity C (BE x y f g) =
  BE (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)
    (# (functor_identity C) f)
    (# (functor_identity C) g) ∥

  
C: category
BE: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
functor_identity C (BE x y f g) =
BE (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)
  (# (functor_identity C) f)
  (# (functor_identity C) g)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq (F ∙ G) BE₁ BE₃


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq (F ∙ G) BE₁ BE₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
  BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
    (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
     BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
       (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
F (BE₁ x y f g) = BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
    BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
      (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
     BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
       (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
 apply propproperty. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
F (BE₁ x y f g) = BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
    BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
      (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
  BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
    (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
     BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
       (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
G (BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
    BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) 
      (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
     BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
       (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
 apply propproperty. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
G (BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
    BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
      (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f))
  (# G (# F g))
∥ (F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
  BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
    (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f))
  (# G (# F g))
(F ∙ G) (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
  (# (F ∙ G) g)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f))
  (# G (# F g))
G (F (BE₁ x y f g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
BE₁: Equalizers C₁
BE₂: Equalizers C₂
BE₃: Equalizers C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq F BE₁ BE₂
HG: preserves_chosen_equalizers_eq G BE₂ BE₃
x, y: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
HFxy: F (BE₁ x y f g) =
BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f))
  (# G (# F g))
G (BE₂ (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
BE₃ (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))

  now rewrite HGxy.
Qed.

(**
 5. Preservation of pullbacks
 *)
Definition preserves_pullback
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z pb : C₁)
       (f : x --> z)
       (g : y --> z)
       (π₁ : pb --> x)
       (π₂ : pb --> y)
       (q : π₁ · f = π₂ · g)
       (Fq : # F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g),
    isPullback q
    →
    @isPullback C₂ _ _ _ _ (#F f) (#F g) (#F π₁) (#F π₂) Fq.


C: category
preserves_pullback (functor_identity C)


C: category
preserves_pullback (functor_identity C)

  
C: category
x, y, z, pb: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (functor_identity C) π₁
· # (functor_identity C) f =
# (functor_identity C) π₂
· # (functor_identity C) g
H: isPullback q
isPullback Fq

  exact H.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
preserves_pullback (F ∙ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
preserves_pullback (F ∙ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
isPullback Fq

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
# F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
isPullback ?q

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
# F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       exact q).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
isPullback
  (composition_preserves_pullback_subproof C₁ C₂ F x y
     z pb f g π₁ π₂ q)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
π₁ · f = π₂ · g
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
isPullback ?q

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
π₁ · f = π₂ · g
 exact q.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pullback F
HG: preserves_pullback G
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # (F ∙ G) π₁ · # (F ∙ G) f =
# (F ∙ G) π₂ · # (F ∙ G) g
H: isPullback q
isPullback q
 exact H.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_pullback F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_pullback F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0, t1, t2: C₁
t3: C₁ ⟦ t, t1 ⟧
t4: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
t5: C₁ ⟦ t2, t ⟧
t6: C₁ ⟦ t2, t0 ⟧
t7: t5 · t3 = t6 · t4
t8: # F t5 · # F t3 = # F t6 · # F t4
t9: isPullback t7
t10: C₂
t11: C₂ ⟦ t10, F t ⟧
t12: C₂ ⟦ t10, F t0 ⟧
t13: t11 · # F t3 = t12 · # F t4
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : t11 · # F t3 = t12 · # F t4,
    ∃! hk : C₂ ⟦ t10, F t2 ⟧,
    hk · # F t5 = t11 × hk · # F t6 = t12) t13)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
UU


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
UU

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (PullbackPr1 (HC₁ z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (HC₁ z x y f g)) · # F g

  abstract
    (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
     apply maponpaths ;
     apply PullbackSqrCommutes).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_pullback HC₁ F
preserves_pullback F


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_pullback HC₁ F
preserves_pullback F

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_pullback HC₁ F
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Hxy: # F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g
Hpb: isPullback p
isPullback Hxy

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_pullback HC₁ F
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Hxy: # F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g
Hpb: isPullback p
functor_on_z_iso F
  (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback (HC₁ z x y f g)
     (make_Pullback p Hpb)) · # F π₁ =
# F (PullbackPr1 (HC₁ z x y f g))
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_pullback HC₁ F
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Hxy: # F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g
Hpb: isPullback p
functor_on_z_iso F
  (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback (HC₁ z x y f g)
     (make_Pullback p Hpb)) · # F π₂ =
# F (PullbackPr2 (HC₁ z x y f g))

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_pullback HC₁ F
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Hxy: # F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g
Hpb: isPullback p
functor_on_z_iso F
  (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback (HC₁ z x y f g)
     (make_Pullback p Hpb)) · # F π₁ =
# F (PullbackPr1 (HC₁ z x y f g))
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback p Hpb))).
  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Pullbacks C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_pullback HC₁ F
x, y, z, pb: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₁ ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C₁ ⟦ pb, y ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Hxy: # F π₁ · # F f = # F π₂ · # F g
Hpb: isPullback p
functor_on_z_iso F
  (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback (HC₁ z x y f g)
     (make_Pullback p Hpb)) · # F π₂ =
# F (PullbackPr2 (HC₁ z x y f g))
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback p Hpb))).
Defined.

Definition preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (P₁ : Pullbacks C₁)
           (P₂ : Pullbacks C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁⟦x,z⟧) (g : C₁⟦y, z⟧), ∥ F (P₁ _ _ _ f g) = P₂ _ _ _ (#F f) (#F g) ∥.


C: category
P: Pullbacks C
preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq (functor_identity C) P P


C: category
P: Pullbacks C
preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq (functor_identity C) P P

  
C: category
P: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
∥ functor_identity C (P z x y f g) =
  P (functor_identity C z) (functor_identity C x)
    (functor_identity C y) (# (functor_identity C) f)
    (# (functor_identity C) g) ∥

  
C: category
P: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
functor_identity C (P z x y f g) =
P (functor_identity C z) (functor_identity C x)
  (functor_identity C y) (# (functor_identity C) f)
  (# (functor_identity C) g)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq (F ∙ G) P₁ P₃


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq (F ∙ G) P₁ P₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
  P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
    (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
     P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
       (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
    P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
      (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
     P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
       (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
 apply propproperty. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
    P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
      (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
  P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
    (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
     P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
       (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
G (P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) 
  (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
    P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) 
      ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f) 
      (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
isaprop
  (∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
     P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
       (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥)
 apply propproperty. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
G (P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f))
  (# G (# F g))
→ ∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
    P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
      (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) 
  (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))
∥ (F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
  P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
    (# (F ∙ G) g) ∥


  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) 
  (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))
(F ∙ G) (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ ((F ∙ G) z) ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y) (# (F ∙ G) f)
  (# (F ∙ G) g)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) 
  (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))
G (F (P₁ z x y f g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f))
  (# G (# F g))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₁: Pullbacks C₁
P₂: Pullbacks C₂
P₃: Pullbacks C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₂
HG: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq G P₂ P₃
x, y, z: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
HFxy: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
HGxy: G (P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) 
  (# G (# F f)) (# G (# F g))
G (P₂ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)) =
P₃ (G (F z)) (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (# G (# F f))
  (# G (# F g))

  now rewrite HGxy.
Qed.

(**
 6. Preservation of initial objects
 *)
Definition preserves_initial
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C₁), isInitial C₁ x → isInitial C₂ (F x).

Definition identity_preserves_initial
           (C : category)
  : preserves_initial (functor_identity C)
  := λ x Hx, Hx.

Definition composition_preserves_initial
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {G : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
           (HF : preserves_initial F)
           (HG : preserves_initial G)
  : preserves_initial (F ∙ G)
  := λ x Hx, HG _ (HF _ Hx).


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_initial F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_initial F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t: C₁
t0: isInitial C₁ t
t1: C₂
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t0 : C₂, iscontr (C₂ ⟦ F t, t0 ⟧)) t1)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition preserves_initial_to_initial
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (HF : preserves_initial F)
           (I : Initial C₁)
  : Initial C₂
  := make_Initial _ (HF _ (pr2 I)).


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_initial F
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
z_iso (preserves_initial_to_initial F HF I₁) I₂


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_initial F
I₁: Initial C₁
I₂: Initial C₂
z_iso (preserves_initial_to_initial F HF I₁) I₂

  use ziso_Initials.
Defined.

Definition preserves_chosen_initial
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (HC₁ : Initial C₁)
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := isInitial C₂ (F (InitialObject HC₁)).


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Initial C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_initial HC₁ F
preserves_initial F


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Initial C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_initial HC₁ F
preserves_initial F

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Initial C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_initial HC₁ F
x: C₁
Hx: isInitial C₁ x
isInitial C₂ (F x)

  exact (iso_to_Initial
           (make_Initial _ HF)
           _
           (functor_on_z_iso
              F
              (ziso_Initials HC₁ (make_Initial _ Hx)))).
Defined.

Definition preserves_chosen_initial_eq
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (T₁ : Initial C₁)
           (T₂ : Initial C₂)
  : UU
  := ∥ F T₁ = T₂ ∥.


C: category
T: Initial C
preserves_chosen_initial_eq (functor_identity C) T T


C: category
T: Initial C
preserves_chosen_initial_eq (functor_identity C) T T

  
C: category
T: Initial C
functor_identity C T = T

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_initial_eq F T₁ T₂
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HF: preserves_chosen_initial_eq F T₁ T₂
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
preserves_chosen_initial_eq F T₁ T₂
→ preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
isaprop (preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
F T₁ = T₂ → preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
isaprop (preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃)

    apply propproperty.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
F T₁ = T₂ → preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
HG: preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
preserves_chosen_initial_eq G T₂ T₃
→ preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
isaprop (preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
G T₂ = T₃ → preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
isaprop (preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃)

    apply propproperty.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
G T₂ = T₃ → preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
q: G T₂ = T₃
preserves_chosen_initial_eq (F ∙ G) T₁ T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
q: G T₂ = T₃
ishinh_UU (G (F T₁) = T₃)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
q: G T₂ = T₃
G (F T₁) = T₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
T₁: Initial C₁
T₂: Initial C₂
T₃: Initial C₃
p: F T₁ = T₂
q: G T₂ = T₃
T₃ = T₃

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(**
 7. Preservation of binary coproducts
 *)
Definition preserves_bincoproduct
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y sum : C₁)
       (ι₁ : x --> sum)
       (ι₂ : y --> sum),
    isBinCoproduct C₁ x y sum ι₁ ι₂
    →
    isBinCoproduct C₂ (F x) (F y) (F sum) (#F ι₁) (#F ι₂).

Definition identity_preserves_bincoproduct
           (C : category)
  : preserves_bincoproduct (functor_identity C)
  := λ _ _ _ _ _ Hx, Hx.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
preserves_bincoproduct (F ∙ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
preserves_bincoproduct (F ∙ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, sum: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, sum ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y sum ι₁ ι₂
isBinCoproduct C₃ ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
  ((F ∙ G) sum) (# (F ∙ G) ι₁) (# (F ∙ G) ι₂)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, sum: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, sum ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y sum ι₁ ι₂
isBinCoproduct C₂ (F x) (F y) (F sum) (# F ι₁)
  (# F ι₂)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
HG: preserves_bincoproduct G
x, y, sum: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, sum ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, sum ⟧
Hx: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y sum ι₁ ι₂
isBinCoproduct C₁ x y sum ι₁ ι₂

  exact Hx.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_bincoproduct F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_bincoproduct F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2: C₁ ⟦ t, t1 ⟧
t3: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
t4: isBinCoproduct C₁ t t0 t1 t2 t3
t5: C₂
t6: C₂ ⟦ F t, t5 ⟧
t7: C₂ ⟦ F t0, t5 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t4 : C₂ ⟦ F t0, t5 ⟧,
    ∃! fg : C₂ ⟦ F t1, t5 ⟧,
    # F t2 · fg = t6 × # F t3 · fg = t4) t7)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition preserves_chosen_bincoproduct
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (HC₁ : BinCoproducts C₁)
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C₁),
     isBinCoproduct
       C₂
       (F x) (F y)
       (F (BinCoproductObject (HC₁ x y)))
       (#F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ x y)))
       (#F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ x y))).


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_bincoproduct HC₁ F
preserves_bincoproduct F


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_bincoproduct HC₁ F
preserves_bincoproduct F

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_bincoproduct HC₁ F
x, y, z: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hxy: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂
isBinCoproduct C₂ (F x) (F y) (F z) (# F ι₁) (# F ι₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_bincoproduct HC₁ F
x, y, z: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hxy: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂
# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ x y))
· # F
    (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C₁ (HC₁ x y)
       (make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂ Hxy)) =
# F ι₁
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_bincoproduct HC₁ F
x, y, z: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hxy: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂
# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ x y))
· # F
    (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C₁ (HC₁ x y)
       (make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂ Hxy)) =
# F ι₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_bincoproduct HC₁ F
x, y, z: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hxy: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂
# F (BinCoproductIn1 (HC₁ x y))
· # F
    (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C₁ (HC₁ x y)
       (make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂ Hxy)) =
# F ι₁
 abstract
      (rewrite <- functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes).
  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: BinCoproducts C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_bincoproduct HC₁ F
x, y, z: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hxy: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂
# F (BinCoproductIn2 (HC₁ x y))
· # F
    (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C₁ (HC₁ x y)
       (make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y z ι₁ ι₂ Hxy)) =
# F ι₂
 abstract
      (rewrite <- functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes).
Defined.

Section Accessors.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          {X X' : C₁}
          (HF : preserves_bincoproduct F)
          (BP : BinCoproduct X X')
          (BP' : BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')).

    Definition preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct
      : BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
      := make_BinCoproduct _ _ _ _ _ _ (HF _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 BP)).

    Definition preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso
      : z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct BP'
      := z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct _ _ _.

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
# F (BinCoproductIn1 BP) =
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
# F (BinCoproductIn1 BP) =
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso =
# F (BinCoproductIn1 BP)

      exact (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
# F (BinCoproductIn2 BP) =
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
# F (BinCoproductIn2 BP) =
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso =
# F (BinCoproductIn2 BP)

      exact (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso
· # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') =
BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso
· # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') =
BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· (inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· (inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· (inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C₂ BP'
     preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· (BinCoproductArrow BP'
     (BinCoproductIn1
        preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP'
    (BinCoproductIn1
       preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
· # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') =
BinCoproductIn1 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct
· # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') = # F f

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
# F (pr121 BP) · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') =
# F f

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
# F (pr121 BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f f') = # F f

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
pr121 BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f f' = f

        apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· (inv_from_z_iso preserves_bincoproduct_to_z_iso
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')
 
C₁, C₂: category

X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F

BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')

f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C₂ BP'
     preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

        
C₁, C₂: category

X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'

Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· (BinCoproductArrow BP'
     (BinCoproductIn1
        preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
   · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f')) =
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP'
    (BinCoproductIn1
       preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct)
· # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') =
BinCoproductIn2 BP'
· BinCoproductArrow BP' (# F f) (# F f')

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 preserves_bincoproduct_to_bincoproduct
· # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') = # F f'

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
# F (pr221 BP) · # F (BinCoproductArrow BP f f') =
# F f'

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
# F (pr221 BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f f') = # F f'

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
X, X': C₁
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
BP: BinCoproduct X X'
BP': BinCoproduct (F X) (F X')
Y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ X', Y ⟧
pr221 BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f f' = f'

        apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
    Qed.
End Accessors.

(**
 8. Preservation of (reflexive) coequalizers
 *)
Definition preserves_coequalizer
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y c : C₁)
       (f g : x --> y)
       (h : y --> c)
       (p : f · h = g · h)
       (Fp : #F f · #F h = #F g · #F h),
     isCoequalizer f g h p
     → isCoequalizer (#F f) (#F g) (#F h) Fp.

Definition identity_preserves_coequalizer
           (C : category)
  : preserves_coequalizer (functor_identity C)
  := λ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ Hx, Hx.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
preserves_coequalizer (F ∙ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
preserves_coequalizer (F ∙ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g)
  (# (F ∙ G) h) Fp

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ?p

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       rewrite p ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h)
  (composition_preserves_coequalizer_subproof C₁ C₂ F
     x y c f g h p)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
f · h = g · h
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer f g h ?p

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
f · h = g · h
 exact p.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer f g h p
 exact Hx.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_coequalizer F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_coequalizer F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2, t3: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
t5: t2 · t4 = t3 · t4
t6: # F t2 · # F t4 = # F t3 · # F t4
t7: isCoequalizer t2 t3 t4 t5
t8: C₂
t9: C₂ ⟦ F t0, t8 ⟧
t10: # F t2 · t9 = # F t3 · t9
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : # F t2 · t9 = # F t3 · t9,
    ∃! φ : C₂ ⟦ F t1, t8 ⟧, # F t4 · φ = t9) t10)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
preserves_coequalizer F
≃ preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
preserves_coequalizer F
≃ preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
preserves_coequalizer F
→ preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)
→ preserves_coequalizer F
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_coequalizer F)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_equalizer (functor_op F))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
preserves_coequalizer F
→ preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p_co: preserves_coequalizer F
preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p_co: preserves_coequalizer F
x, y, e: C₁ ^opp
f, g: C₁ ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ^opp ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (functor_op F) h · # (functor_op F) f =
# (functor_op F) h · # (functor_op F) g
p_e: isEqualizer f g h p
isEqualizer (# (functor_op F) f) (# (functor_op F) g)
  (# (functor_op F) h) Fp

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p_co: preserves_coequalizer F
x, y, e: C₁ ^opp
f, g: C₁ ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ^opp ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (functor_op F) h · # (functor_op F) f =
# (functor_op F) h · # (functor_op F) g
p_e: isEqualizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# (functor_op F) f)
  (# (functor_op F) g) (# (functor_op F) h) Fp

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p_co: preserves_coequalizer F
x, y, e: C₁ ^opp
f, g: C₁ ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ^opp ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # (functor_op F) h · # (functor_op F) f =
# (functor_op F) h · # (functor_op F) g
p_e: isEqualizer f g h p
Fp_e:= isEqualizer_opp (C₁ ^opp) f g h p p_e: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# (functor_op F) f)
  (# (functor_op F) g) (# (functor_op F) h) Fp

    apply (p_co _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ Fp_e).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)
→ preserves_coequalizer F
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p_coop: preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)
preserves_coequalizer F

x, y, e: C₁

h: C₁ ⟦ y, e ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
p_e: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) Fp

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

h: C₁ ⟦ y, e ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h

isEqualizer f g h ?p

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p_coop: preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)
x, y, e: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, e ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
p_e: isCoequalizer f g h p
h · f = h · g
 exact p.

p_coop: preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)

h: C₁ ⟦ y, e ⟧
p: f · h = g · h

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p_coop: preserves_equalizer (functor_op F)

h: C₁ ⟦ y, e ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
p_e: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer f g h p

      exact p_e.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_coequalizer F)
 apply isaprop_preserves_coequalizer.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_equalizer (functor_op F))
 apply isaprop_preserves_equalizer.
Qed.

Definition preserves_chosen_coequalizer
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (HC₁ : Coequalizers C₁)
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C₁)
       (f g : x --> y)
       (p : # F f · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))
            =
            # F g · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))),
     isCoequalizer
       (#F f)
       (#F g)
       (#F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)))
       p.


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_coequalizer HC₁ F
preserves_coequalizer F


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_coequalizer HC₁ F
preserves_coequalizer F

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) Fp

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))
· # F (CoequalizerOut (HC₁ x y f g) c h p) = # F h
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) =
# F g · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))
· # F (CoequalizerOut (HC₁ x y f g) c h p) = # F h
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       rewrite CoequalizerCommutes ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: Coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g)) =
# F g · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g))
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       rewrite CoequalizerEqAr ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.

Definition preserves_reflexive_coequalizer
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y c : C₁)
       (f g : x --> y)
       (s : y --> x)
       (pf : s · f = identity _)
       (pg : s · g = identity _)
       (h : y --> c)
       (p : f · h = g · h)
       (Fp : #F f · #F h = #F g · #F h),
     isCoequalizer f g h p
     →
     isCoequalizer (#F f) (#F g) (#F h) Fp.

Definition identity_preserves_reflexive_coequalizer
           (C : category)
  : preserves_coequalizer (functor_identity C)
  := λ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ Hx, Hx.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
preserves_reflexive_coequalizer (F ∙ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
preserves_reflexive_coequalizer (F ∙ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g)
  (# (F ∙ G) h) Fp

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F s · # F f = identity (F y)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F s · # F g = identity (F y)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G

pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =

Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ?p

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F s · # F f = identity (F y)
 abstract
      (rewrite <- functor_comp ;
       rewrite pf ;
       apply functor_id).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F s · # F g = identity (F y)
 abstract
      (rewrite <- functor_comp ;
       rewrite pg ;
       apply functor_id).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       rewrite p ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h)
  (composition_preserves_reflexive_coequalizer_subproof1
     C₁ C₂ F x y c f g h p)

p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =

Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
s · f = identity y

 exact pf.

pf: s · f = identity y

p: f · h = g · h

 exact pg.

HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y

p: f · h = g · h
