C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F
HG: preserves_reflexive_coequalizer G
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) h =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) h
Hx: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer f g h p
 exact Hx.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2, t3: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C₁ ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t5: t4 · t2 = identity t0
t6: t4 · t3 = identity t0
t7: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
t8: t2 · t7 = t3 · t7
t9: # F t2 · # F t7 = # F t3 · # F t7
t10: isCoequalizer t2 t3 t7 t8
t11: C₂
t12: C₂ ⟦ F t0, t11 ⟧
t13: # F t2 · t12 = # F t3 · t12
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : # F t2 · t12 = # F t3 · t12,
    ∃! φ : C₂ ⟦ F t1, t11 ⟧, # F t7 · φ = t12) t13)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (HC₁ : reflexive_coequalizers C₁)
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C₁)
       (f g : x --> y)
       (s : y --> x)
       (pf : s · f = identity _)
       (pg : s · g = identity _)
       (p : # F f · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg))
            =
            # F g · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg))),
     isCoequalizer
       (#F f)
       (#F g)
       (#F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg)))
       p.


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: reflexive_coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer HC₁ F
preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: reflexive_coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer HC₁ F
preserves_reflexive_coequalizer F

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: reflexive_coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
isCoequalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) Fp

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: reflexive_coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg))
· # F (CoequalizerOut (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg) c h p) =
# F h
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: reflexive_coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg)) =
# F g · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg))

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: reflexive_coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg))
· # F (CoequalizerOut (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg) c h p) =
# F h
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       rewrite CoequalizerCommutes ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: reflexive_coequalizers C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_chosen_reflexive_coequalizer HC₁ F
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
s: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pf: s · f = identity y
pg: s · g = identity y
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # F f · # F h = # F g · # F h
Hz: isCoequalizer f g h p
# F f · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg)) =
# F g · # F (CoequalizerArrow (HC₁ x y f g s pf pg))
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       rewrite CoequalizerEqAr ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.

(**
 9. Preservation of coproducts
 *)
Definition preserves_coproduct
           (J : UU)
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (D : J → C₁)
       (c : C₁)
       (ι : ∏ (j : J), D j --> c),
     isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
     →
     isCoproduct J C₂ (λ j, F (D j)) (F c) (λ j, #F (ι j)).

Definition identity_preserves_coproduct
           (C : category)
           (J : UU)
  : preserves_coproduct J (functor_identity C)
  := λ _ _ _ Hx, Hx.


J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coproduct J F
HG: preserves_coproduct J G
preserves_coproduct J (F ∙ G)


J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coproduct J F
HG: preserves_coproduct J G
preserves_coproduct J (F ∙ G)

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coproduct J F
HG: preserves_coproduct J G
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧
Hx: isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
isCoproduct J C₃ (λ j : J, (F ∙ G) (D j)) ((F ∙ G) c)
  (λ j : J, # (F ∙ G) (ι j))

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coproduct J F
HG: preserves_coproduct J G
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧
Hx: isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
isCoproduct J C₂ (λ j : J, F (D j)) (F c)
  (λ j : J, # F (ι j))

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_coproduct J F
HG: preserves_coproduct J G
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧
Hx: isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι

  exact Hx.
Defined.


J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_coproduct J F)


J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_coproduct J F)

  
J: UU
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t: J → C₁
t0: C₁
t1: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ t j, t0 ⟧
t2: isCoproduct J C₁ t t0 t1
t3: C₂
t4: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ (λ j : J, F (t j)) i, t3 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t2 : ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ (λ j : J, F (t j)) i, t3 ⟧,
    ∃! g : C₂ ⟦ F t0, t3 ⟧,
    ∏ i : J, (λ j : J, # F (t1 j)) i · g = t2 i) t4)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition preserves_chosen_coproduct
           (J : UU)
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (HC₁ : Coproducts J C₁)
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (D : J → C₁),
     isCoproduct
       J
       C₂
       (λ j, F(D j))
       (F (HC₁ D))
       (λ j, #F (CoproductIn _ _ (HC₁ D) j)).

(**
 10. Preservation of pushouts
 *)
Definition preserves_pushout
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z po : C₁)
       (f : x --> y)
       (g : x --> z)
       (i₁ : y --> po)
       (i₂ : z --> po)
       (q : f · i₁ = g · i₂)
       (Fq : # F f · #F i₁ = #F g · #F i₂),
     isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
     →
     isPushout (#F f) (#F g) (#F i₁) (#F i₂) Fq.


C: category
preserves_pushout (functor_identity C)


C: category
preserves_pushout (functor_identity C)

  
C: category
x, y, z, po: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (functor_identity C) f
· # (functor_identity C) i₁ =
# (functor_identity C) g
· # (functor_identity C) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
isPushout (# (functor_identity C) f)
  (# (functor_identity C) g)
  (# (functor_identity C) i₁)
  (# (functor_identity C) i₂) Fq

  exact H.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
preserves_pushout (F ∙ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
preserves_pushout (F ∙ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
isPushout (# (F ∙ G) f) (# (F ∙ G) g) (# (F ∙ G) i₁)
  (# (F ∙ G) i₂) Fq

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
# F f · # F i₁ = # F g · # F i₂
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
isPushout (# F f) (# F g) (# F i₁) (# F i₂) ?q

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
# F f · # F i₁ = # F g · # F i₂
 abstract
      (rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       exact q).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
isPushout (# F f) (# F g) (# F i₁) (# F i₂)
  (composition_preserves_pushout_subproof C₁ C₂ F x y
     z po f g i₁ i₂ q)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
f · i₁ = g · i₂
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
isPushout f g i₁ i₂ ?q

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
f · i₁ = g · i₂
 exact q.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HF: preserves_pushout F
HG: preserves_pushout G
x, y, z, po: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ x, z ⟧
i₁: C₁ ⟦ y, po ⟧
i₂: C₁ ⟦ z, po ⟧
q: f · i₁ = g · i₂
Fq: # (F ∙ G) f · # (F ∙ G) i₁ =
# (F ∙ G) g · # (F ∙ G) i₂
H: isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
isPushout f g i₁ i₂ q
 exact H.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_pushout F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (preserves_pushout F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0, t1, t2: C₁
t3: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C₁ ⟦ t, t1 ⟧
t5: C₁ ⟦ t0, t2 ⟧
t6: C₁ ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
t7: t3 · t5 = t4 · t6
t8: # F t3 · # F t5 = # F t4 · # F t6
t9: isPushout t3 t4 t5 t6 t7
t10: C₂
t11: C₂ ⟦ F t0, t10 ⟧
t12: C₂ ⟦ F t1, t10 ⟧
t13: # F t3 · t11 = # F t4 · t12
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : # F t3 · t11 = # F t4 · t12,
    ∃! hk : C₂ ⟦ F t2, t10 ⟧,
    # F t5 · hk = t11 × # F t6 · hk = t12) t13)

  use isapropiscontr.
Qed.

(**
 11. Adjunctions and preservation
 *)
Section AdjunctionPreservation.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (L : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (HL : is_left_adjoint L).

  Let R : C₂ ⟶ C₁ := right_adjoint HL.
  Let η : functor_identity _ ⟹ L ∙ R := unit_from_left_adjoint HL.
  Let ε : R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity _ := counit_from_left_adjoint HL.

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x: C₁
# L (η x) · ε (L x) = identity (L x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x: C₁
# L (η x) · ε (L x) = identity (L x)

    exact (pr122 HL x).
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x: C₂
η (R x) · # R (ε x) = identity (R x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x: C₂
η (R x) · # R (ε x) = identity (R x)

    exact (pr222 HL x).
  Qed.

  (**
   11.1 Right adjoints preserve limits
   *)
  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
preserves_terminal R

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
preserves_terminal R

    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
T: C₂
HT: isTerminal C₂ T
x: C₁
iscontr (C₁ ⟦ x, R T ⟧)

    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
T: C₂
HT: isTerminal C₂ T
x: C₁
isaprop (C₁ ⟦ x, R T ⟧)

HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

HT: isTerminal C₂ T
x: C₁
C₁ ⟦ x, R T ⟧

      apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ (T ,, HT)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
T: C₂
HT: isTerminal C₂ T
x: C₁
C₁ ⟦ x, R T ⟧
 exact (η x · #R (TerminalArrow (_ ,, HT) _)).
  Qed.

π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧

f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
∃! fg : C₁ ⟦ c, R p ⟧,
fg · # R π₁ = f × fg · # R π₂ = g

π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
g₁, g₂: ∑ fg : C₁ ⟦ c, R p ⟧,
fg · # R π₁ = f × fg · # R π₂ = g
pr1 g₁ · (η (R p) · # R (ε p)) =
pr1 g₂ · (η (R p) · # R (ε p))

      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

fg · # R π₁ = f × fg · # R π₂ = g
pr1 g₁ · η (R p) · # R (ε p) =
pr1 g₂ · η (R p) · # R (ε p)

η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧

f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
g₁, g₂: ∑ fg : C₁ ⟦ c, R p ⟧,
fg · # R π₁ = f × fg · # R π₂ = g
ε p · π₁ = ?t2

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, p: C₂
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
g₁, g₂: ∑ fg : C₁ ⟦ c, R p ⟧,
fg · # R π₁ = f × fg · # R π₂ = g
# L (pr1 g₁) · (ε p · π₂) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
g₁, g₂: ∑ fg : C₁ ⟦ c, R p ⟧,
fg · # R π₁ = f × fg · # R π₂ = g
?b = # L (pr1 g₂) · (# (R ∙ L) π₂ · ε y)

:

 exact (η c · #R (BinProductArrow _ P (#L f · ε x) (#L g · ε y))).

π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧

Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
η c · # R (# L f) · # R (ε x) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, p: C₂
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
?b = f

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R

π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧

:

# (functor_identity C₁) f · η (R x) · # R (ε x) = f

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, p: C₂
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
# (functor_identity C₁) f · identity (R x) = f

        apply id_right.
      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, p: C₂
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
(λ _ : η c
       · # R
           (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x)
              (# L g · ε y)) · # R π₁ = f,
 η c
 · # R
     (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x) (# L g · ε y))
 · # R π₂ = g)
  (internal_paths_rew_r
     (C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ c, R x ⟧)
     (η c
      · # R
          (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x)
             (# L g · ε y)) · # R π₁)
     (η c
      · (# R
           (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x)
              (# L g · ε y)) · # R π₁))
     (λ p : C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ c, R x ⟧, p = f)
     (maponpaths (compose (η c))
        (! functor_comp R
             (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x)
                (# L g · ε y)) π₁ @
         maponpaths # R
           (BinProductPr1Commutes C₂ x y P (L c)
              (# L f · ε x) (# L g · ε y))) @
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (C₁ ⟦ R (L c), R (functor_identity C₂ x) ⟧)
        (# R (# L f · ε x)) (# R (# L f) · # R (ε x))
        (λ p : C₁ ⟦ R (L c), R (functor_identity C₂ x)
               ⟧, η c · p = f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ c,
            R (functor_identity C₂ x) ⟧)
           (η c · (# R (# L f) · # R (ε x)))
           (η c · # R (# L f) · # R (ε x))
           (λ p : C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ c,
                  R (functor_identity C₂ x) ⟧, p = f)
           (maponpaths_2 compose
              (! nat_trans_ax η c (R x) f) (# R (ε x)) @
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ c,
               R (functor_identity C₂ x) ⟧)
              (# (functor_identity C₁) f · η (R x)
               · # R (ε x))
              (# (functor_identity C₁) f
               · (η (R x) · # R (ε x)))
              (λ p : C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ c,
                     R (functor_identity C₂ x) ⟧,
               p = f)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ (R x),
                  R (functor_identity C₂ x) ⟧)
                 (η (R x) · # R (ε x))
                 (identity (R x))
                 (λ p : C₁
                        ⟦ functor_identity C₁ (R x),
                        R (functor_identity C₂ x) ⟧,
                  # (functor_identity C₁) f · p = f)
                 (id_right f) (triangle_2_help x))
              (assoc' (# (functor_identity C₁) f)
                 (η (R x)) (# R (ε x))))
           (assoc (η c) (# R (# L f)) (# R (ε x))))
        (functor_comp R (# L f) (ε x)))
     (assoc' (η c)
        (# R
           (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x)
              (# L g · ε y))) (# R π₁)))
 
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, p: C₂
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) c
· # R
    (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x) (# L g · ε y))
· # R π₂ = g

P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp

unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) c
· (# R
     (BinProductArrow C₂ P (# L f · ε x) (# L g · ε y))
   · # R π₂) = g

# (functor_identity C₁) g · (η (R y) · # R (ε y)) = g

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, p: C₂
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
Hp: isBinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂
c: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, R x ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ c, R y ⟧
P:= make_BinProduct C₂ x y p π₁ π₂ Hp
:
BinProduct C₂ x y: BinProduct C₂ x y
# (functor_identity C₁) g · identity (R y) = g

        apply id_right.
  Qed.

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
preserves_pullback R

f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g

hk · # R π₁ = h₁ × hk · # R π₂ = h₂

pr1 g₂ · η (R p) · # R (ε p) =
η w · # (L ∙ R) (pr1 g₁) · # R (ε p)

r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
g₁, g₂: ∑ hk : C₁ ⟦ w, R p ⟧,
hk · # R π₁ = h₁ × hk · # R π₂ = h₂
# L (pr1 g₁) · (ε p · π₁) =
# L (pr1 g₂) · (# (R ∙ L) π₁ · ε x)

η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

Hp: isPullback q

# L (pr1 g₁) · (ε p · π₁) = ?b

# L (pr1 g₂) · (# (R ∙ L) π₂ · ε y)

f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧

w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
# L h₁ · ε x · f = # L h₂ · ε y · g

        abstract
          (rewrite !assoc' ;
           refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (!(nat_trans_ax ε _ _ f)) @ _) ;
           refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (nat_trans_ax ε _ _ g)) ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           refine (!(functor_comp L _ _) @ _ @ functor_comp L _ _) ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact r).
      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
η w
· # R
    (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
       (# L h₂ · ε y)
       (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y
          z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₁ = h₁

· (# R

           z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₁) = h₁

η w
· (# R
     (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
        (# L h₂ · ε y)
        (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y
           z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₁) = ?b

          
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
# R
  (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x) (# L h₂ · ε y)
     (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y z
        f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₁ = ?t2

          
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
# R
  (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x) (# L h₂ · ε y)
     (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y z
        f g w h₁ h₂ r) · π₁) = ?t2

          
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x) (# L h₂ · ε y)
  (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y z f g
     w h₁ h₂ r) · π₁ = ?t2

          apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
η w · # R (# L h₁ · ε x) = h₁

f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧

h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
η w · (# R (# L h₁) · # R (ε x)) = h₁

h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧

r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
# (functor_identity C₁) h₁ · η (R x) · # R (ε x) = h₁

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
# (functor_identity C₁) h₁ · η (R x) · # R (ε x) =
h₁ · identity (R x)

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
# (functor_identity C₁) h₁ · (η (R x) · # R (ε x)) =
h₁ · identity (R x)

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
η (R x) · # R (ε x) = identity (R x)

        apply triangle_2_help.
      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
(λ _ : η w
       · # R
           (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
              (# L h₂ · ε y)
              (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof
                 x y z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₁ = h₁,
 η w
 · # R
     (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
        (# L h₂ · ε y)
        (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y
           z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₂ = h₂)
  (internal_paths_rew_r
     (C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ w, R x ⟧)
     (η w
      · # R
          (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
             (# L h₂ · ε y)
             (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof
                x y z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₁)
     (η w
      · (# R
           (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
              (# L h₂ · ε y)
              (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof
                 x y z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₁))
     (λ p : C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ w, R x ⟧, p = h₁)
     (maponpaths (compose (η w))
        (! functor_comp R
             (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
                (# L h₂ · ε y)
                (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof
                   x y z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) π₁ @
         maponpaths # R
           (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P (L w)
              (# L h₁ · ε x) (# L h₂ · ε y)
              (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof
                 x y z f g w h₁ h₂ r))) @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C₁ ⟦ R (L w), R x ⟧)
        (# R (# L h₁ · ε x))
        (# R (# L h₁) · # R (ε x))
        (λ p : C₁ ⟦ R (L w), R x ⟧, η w · p = h₁)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ w, R x ⟧)
           (η w · (# R (# L h₁) · # R (ε x)))
           (η w · # R (# L h₁) · # R (ε x))
           (λ p : C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ w, R x ⟧,
            p = h₁)
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ w,
                     (L ∙ R) (R x) ⟧, z · # R (ε x))
              (! nat_trans_ax η w (R x) h₁) @
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ w, R x ⟧)
              (# (functor_identity C₁) h₁ · η (R x)
               · # R (ε x))
              (# (functor_identity C₁) h₁
               · (η (R x) · # R (ε x)))
              (λ p : C₁ ⟦ functor_identity C₁ w, R x ⟧,
               p = h₁ · identity (R x))
              (maponpaths (compose h₁)
                 (triangle_2_help x))
              (assoc' (# (functor_identity C₁) h₁)
                 (η (R x)) (# R (ε x))) @ id_right h₁)
           (assoc (η w) (# R (# L h₁)) (# R (ε x))))
        (functor_comp R (# L h₁) (ε x)))
     (assoc' (η w)
        (# R
           (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
              (# L h₂ · ε y)
              (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof
                 x y z f g w h₁ h₂ r))) (# R π₁)))
 
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
η w
· # R
    (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
       (# L h₂ · ε y)
       (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y
          z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₂ = h₂

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁

h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
η w
· (# R
     (PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x)
        (# L h₂ · ε y)
        (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y
           z f g w h₁ h₂ r)) · # R π₂) = h₂

h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g

?b = h₂

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
PullbackArrow P (L w) (# L h₁ · ε x) (# L h₂ · ε y)
  (right_adjoint_preserves_pullback_subproof x y z f g
     w h₁ h₂ r) · π₂ = ?t2

          apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 P).
        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, z, p: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
π₁: C₂ ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C₂ ⟦ p, y ⟧
q: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
Fq: # R π₁ · # R f = # R π₂ · # R g
Hp: isPullback q
w: C₁
h₁: C₁ ⟦ w, R x ⟧
h₂: C₁ ⟦ w, R y ⟧
r: h₁ · # R f = h₂ · # R g
P:= make_Pullback q Hp: Pullback f g
η w · # R (# L h₂ · ε y) = h₂

h: C₂ ⟦ c, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, R c ⟧, φ · # R h = k
# (L ∙ R) (pr1 φ₁) · # R (ε c) =
# (L ∙ R) (pr1 φ₂) · # R (ε c)

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁

q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, R c ⟧, φ · # R h = k
# R (# L (pr1 φ₁) · ε c) = # R (# L (pr1 φ₂) · ε c)

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₂
f, g: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ c, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
# L k · ε x · f = # L k · ε x · g

        abstract
          (rewrite !assoc' ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths ;
             exact (!(nat_trans_ax ε _ _ f))
           | ] ;
           refine (!_) ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths ;
             exact (!(nat_trans_ax ε _ _ g))
           | ] ;
           cbn -[ε] ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           rewrite <- q ;
           apply idpath).
      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₂
f, g: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ c, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
(λ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, R c ⟧, φ · # R h = k)
  (η z
   · # R
       (EqualizerIn Eq (L z) (# L k · ε x)
          (right_adjoint_preserves_equalizer_subproof
             x y f g z k q)))
 
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₂
f, g: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ c, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) z
· # R
    (EqualizerIn Eq (L z) (# L k · ε x)
       (right_adjoint_preserves_equalizer_subproof x y
          f g z k q)) · # R h = k

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

f, g: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ c, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) z
· (# R
     (EqualizerIn Eq (L z) (# L k · ε x)
        (right_adjoint_preserves_equalizer_subproof x
           y f g z k q)) · # R h) = k

q: k · # R f = k · # R g

unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) z
· # R
    (EqualizerIn Eq (L z) (# L k · ε x)
       (right_adjoint_preserves_equalizer_subproof x y
          f g z k q) · h) = k

Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) z · # R (# L k)
· # R (ε x) = ?b

          
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₂
f, g: C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ c, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) z · # R (# L k) = ?y'

          apply (!(nat_trans_ax η _ _ k)).

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # R h · # R f = # R h · # R g
Hc: isEqualizer f g h p
z: C₁
k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
# (functor_identity C₁) k · η (R x) · # R (ε x) = k

q: k · # R f = k · # R g

k · unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (R x) · # R (ε x) =

· (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (R x) · # R (ε x)) =

q: k · # R f = k · # R g

· (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (R x) · # R (ε x)) =

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁

p: h · f = h · g

Hc: isEqualizer f g h p

k: C₁ ⟦ z, R x ⟧
q: k · # R f = k · # R g
Eq:= make_Equalizer f g h p Hc: Equalizer f g
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (R x) · # R (ε x) =
identity (R x)

        exact (triangle_2_help x).
  Qed.

  (**
   11.2 Left adjoints preserve colimits
   *)

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
preserves_initial L

 exact (#L (InitialArrow I _) · ε y).
  Qed.

ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, s ⟧
Hs: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂

g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
∃! fg : C₂ ⟦ L s, z ⟧,
# L ι₁ · fg = f × # L ι₂ · fg = g

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

f: C₂ ⟦ L x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
∃! fg : C₂ ⟦ L s, z ⟧,

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

f: C₂ ⟦ L x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C₂ ⟦ L s, z ⟧,
   # L ι₁ · fg = f × # L ι₂ · fg = g)
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, s: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, s ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, s ⟧
Hs: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂
z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ L x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
∑ fg : C₂ ⟦ L s, z ⟧,
# L ι₁ · fg = f × # L ι₂ · fg = g

  (∑ fg : C₂ ⟦ L s, z ⟧,
   # L ι₁ · fg = f × # L ι₂ · fg = g)

η x · (# (L ∙ R) ι₁ · # R (pr1 g₂))

S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
# L (η x) · ε (L x) = identity (L x)

        apply triangle_1_help.
      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, s: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, s ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, s ⟧
Hs: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂
z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ L x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
(λ _ : # L ι₁
       · (# L
            (BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
               (η y · # R g)) · ε z) = f,
 # L ι₂
 · (# L
      (BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f) (η y · # R g))
    · ε z) = g)
  (internal_paths_rew_r
     (C₂ ⟦ L x, functor_identity C₂ z ⟧)
     (# L ι₁
      · (# L
           (BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
              (η y · # R g)) · ε z))
     (# L ι₁
      · # L
          (BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
             (η y · # R g)) · ε z)
     (λ p : C₂ ⟦ L x, functor_identity C₂ z ⟧, p = f)
     (internal_paths_rew (C₂ ⟦ L x, L (R z) ⟧)
        (# L
           (ι₁
            · BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
                (η y · # R g)))
        (λ p : C₂ ⟦ L x, L (R z) ⟧, p · ε z = f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C₁ ⟦ x, R z ⟧)
           (BinCoproductIn1 S
            · BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
                (η y · # R g)) (η x · # R f)
           (λ p : C₁ ⟦ x, R z ⟧, # L p · ε z = f)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (C₂ ⟦ L (functor_identity C₁ x), L (R z)
               ⟧) (# L (η x · # R f))
              (# L (η x) · # L (# R f))
              (λ p : C₂ ⟦ L (functor_identity C₁ x),
                     L (R z) ⟧, p · ε z = f)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C₂ ⟦ L (functor_identity C₁ x),
                  functor_identity C₂ z ⟧)
                 (# L (η x) · # L (# R f) · ε z)
                 (# L (η x) · (# L (# R f) · ε z))
                 (λ p : C₂
                        ⟦ L (functor_identity C₁ x),
                        functor_identity C₂ z ⟧, p = f)
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ (R ∙ L) (L x),
                            functor_identity C₂ z ⟧,
                     # L (η x) · z0)
                    (nat_trans_ax ε (L x) z f) @
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C₂ ⟦ L x, functor_identity C₂ z ⟧)
                    (# L (η x)
                     · (ε (L x)
                        · # (functor_identity C₂) f))
                    (# L (η x) · ε (L x)
                     · # (functor_identity C₂) f)
                    (λ p : C₂ ⟦ L x,
                           functor_identity C₂ z ⟧,
                     p = f)
                    (maponpaths_2 compose
                       (triangle_1_help x) f @
                     id_left f)
                    (assoc (# L (η x)) (ε (L x))
                       (# (functor_identity C₂) f)))
                 (assoc' (# L (η x)) (# L (# R f))
                    (ε z)))
              (functor_comp L (η x) (# R f)))
           (BinCoproductIn1Commutes C₁ x y S (R z)
              (η x · # R f) (η y · # R g)))
        (# L ι₁
         · # L
             (BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
                (η y · # R g)))
        (functor_comp L ι₁
           (BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
              (η y · # R g))))
     (assoc (# L ι₁)
        (# L
           (BinCoproductArrow S (η x · # R f)
              (η y · # R g))) (ε z)))
 
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, s: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, s ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, s ⟧
Hs: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂
z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ L x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
# L ι₂
· (# L
     (BinCoproductArrow S
        (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) x · # R f)
        (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) y · # R g))
   · ε z) = g

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, s: C₁
ι₁: C₁ ⟦ x, s ⟧
ι₂: C₁ ⟦ y, s ⟧
Hs: isBinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂
z: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ L x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
# L ι₂
· # L
    (BinCoproductArrow S
       (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) x · # R f)
       (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) y · # R g))
· ε z = g

g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧

# L
  (ι₂
   · BinCoproductArrow S
       (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) x · # R f)
       (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) y · # R g))
· ε z = g

g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧

· # (functor_identity C₂) g = identity (L y) · g

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L

f: C₂ ⟦ L x, z ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
S:= make_BinCoproduct C₁ x y s ι₁ ι₂ Hs: BinCoproduct x y
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) y) · ε (L y) =
identity (L y)

        apply triangle_1_help.
  Qed.

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

J: UU
preserves_coproduct J L

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
J: UU
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧
Hc: isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
x: C₂
f: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ L (D i), x ⟧
∃! g : C₂ ⟦ L c, x ⟧, ∏ i : J, # L (ι i) · g = f i

D: J → C₁
c: C₁

Hc: isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
x: C₂
f: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ L (D i), x ⟧
S:= make_Coproduct J C₁ D c ι Hc: Coproduct J C₁ D
∃! g : C₂ ⟦ L c, x ⟧, ∏ i : J, # L (ι i) · g = f i

isaprop
  (∑ g : C₂ ⟦ L c, x ⟧, ∏ i : J, # L (ι i) · g = f i)

S:= make_Coproduct J C₁ D c ι Hc: Coproduct J C₁ D

identity (L c) · pr1 g₁ = identity (L c) · pr1 g₂

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
J: UU
D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧
Hc: isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
x: C₂
f: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ L (D i), x ⟧
S:= make_Coproduct J C₁ D c ι Hc: Coproduct J C₁ D
j: J
# L (η (D j)) · # L (# R (f j)) · ε x = f j

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

j: J

ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧

f: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ L (D i), x ⟧

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧

x: C₂
f: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ L (D i), x ⟧

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

D: J → C₁
c: C₁
ι: ∏ j : J, C₁ ⟦ D j, c ⟧
Hc: isCoproduct J C₁ D c ι
x: C₂
f: ∏ i : J, C₂ ⟦ L (D i), x ⟧

# L (η (D j)) · ε (L (D j)) = identity (L (D j))

        apply triangle_1_help.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
preserves_coequalizer L

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
∃! φ : C₂ ⟦ L c, z ⟧, # L h · φ = k

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₂ ⟦ L c, z ⟧, # L h · φ = k
pr21 Coeq · (η c · # R (pr1 φ₁)) =
pr21 Coeq · (η c · # R (pr1 φ₂))

      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₂ ⟦ L c, z ⟧, # L h · φ = k
pr21 Coeq · η c · # R (pr1 φ₁) =
pr21 Coeq · η c · # R (pr1 φ₂)

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
f · (η y · # R k) = g · (η y · # R k)

        abstract
          (rewrite !assoc ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
             exact (nat_trans_ax η _ _ f)
           | ] ;
           refine (!_) ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
             exact (nat_trans_ax η _ _ g)
           | ] ;
           cbn -[η] ;
           rewrite !assoc' ;
           rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           rewrite <- q ;
           apply idpath).
      
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
(λ φ : C₂ ⟦ L c, z ⟧, # L h · φ = k)
  (# L
     (CoequalizerOut Coeq (R z) (η y · # R k)
        (left_adjoint_preserves_coequalizer_subproof x
           y f g z k q)) · ε z)

q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
# L h
· (# L
     (CoequalizerOut Coeq (R z) (η y · # R k)
        (left_adjoint_preserves_coequalizer_subproof x
           y f g z k q)) · ε z) = k

z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
# L (η y) · (ε (L y) · k) = k

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
# L (η y) · ε (L y) · k = k

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
# L (η y) · ε (L y) · k = identity (L y) · k

        
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint HL: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint HL: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
x, y, c: C₁
f, g: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C₁ ⟦ y, c ⟧
p: f · h = g · h
Fp: # L f · # L h = # L g · # L h
Hc: isCoequalizer f g h p
z: C₂
k: C₂ ⟦ L y, z ⟧
q: # L f · k = # L g · k
Coeq:= make_Coequalizer f g h p Hc: Coequalizer f g
# L (η y) · ε (L y) = identity (L y)

        exact (triangle_1_help y).
  Qed.
End AdjunctionPreservation.
